title: daucus pumilus var. breviaculeatus
intro: Daucus pumilus var. breviaculeatus, also known as the wild carrot or small wild carrot, is a variety of wild carrot native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Daucus pumilus var. breviaculeatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, allowing for various applications in herbal remedies.
